title: The "Tribhuvan" Sahkari University Act, 2025
full_text: The "Tribhuvan" Sahkari University Act, 2025 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: A2025-11 Act Number: 11 Enactment Date: 2025-04-03 Act Year: 2025 Short Title: The "Tribhuvan" Sahkari University Act, 2025 Long Title: An Act to establish the Institute of Rural Management Anand, as a University to be known as the “Tribhuvan” Sahkari University and to declare the same as an institution of national importance; to impart technical and management education and training in co-operative sector; to promote co-operative research and development and to attain standards of global excellence therein in order to realise the vision of “Sahkar Se Samriddhi” and to strengthen the co-operative movementin the country through a network of institutions, and also to declare the Institute as one of the Schools of the University and for matters connected therewith or incidental thereto. Ministry: Ministry of Cooperation Enforcement Date: 05-04-2025 Schedule 1. THE FIRST SCHEDULE Order Appendix Forms Schedule 2.
